semantic.judge: the scanner finds no migration/rollback vocabulary (mentions:false); the griller's ADVISORY layer surfaces that a schema change (dropping users.legacy_flag and adding users.status) is planned with no declared migration and no rollback path — an unlabeled irreversibility limit — citing P7 (honest scope).
